title: Enable packit copr-builds
body:
Filing this for myself. Packit will enable build checks on PRs as in the attached image and will provide advance warning of any dependency failures which will give @jnovy fewer things to worry about for centos stream.

Before we can get packit in, we'll need to revisit toml v/s tomli for centos stream for downstream support as well as maintenance costs on the team.


![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/247367/219418062-6360f75d-b45d-490b-8311-9a7b8813bd0a.png)


@umohnani8 @rhatdan wdyt ?
